name: Apex — Tri-Model Council (DeepSeek-R1 + Qwen3.5 + Kimi K2)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'deepseek-v3.2', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.deepseek_prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.6, num_predict: 2048 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen3.5:397b', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.qwen_prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.7, num_predict: 2048 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2-thinking', prompt: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.kimi_prompt, stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.5, num_predict: 4096 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ task: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.task_type, query: $('Prepare Prompts').item.json.context.substring(0,500), model: $json.best_model + ':tri-council', success: !$json.hard_fail && !$json.fallback_used, score: $json.best_score }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.hard_fail ? 'REJECTED' : ($('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.fallback_used ? 'FALLBACK' : 'APPROVED'), platform: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.platform, hard_fail: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.hard_fail, fallback_used: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.fallback_used, winning_model: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.best_label, response: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.best_response, confidence_score: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.best_score, all_models: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.all_responses, timestamp: $('Weighted Score & Hard-Fail Gate').item.json.timestamp }) }}

notes: OLLAMA_BASE_URL defaults to host.docker.internal:11434 for Docker-to-host communication
If Ollama runs on bare metal, set OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0 and OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434
Fallback cascade logs errors to console.error for trace analysis
Model IDs corrected: qwen3 -> qwen3.5 for consistency with actual model names
